nodes.name: Slack Interaction Webhook (rawBody)
nodes.notes: Retain raw body for Slack HMAC. Point Slack Interactivity Request URL here.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ batch_id: $('Verify HMAC Timestamp Channel User').item.json.batch_id }) }}

nodes.name: POST Batch Approve
nodes.notes: batch_id only — never sequence_ids from Slack

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ batch_id: $('Verify HMAC Timestamp Channel User').item.json.batch_id }) }}

nodes.name: POST Batch Reject
nodes.notes: batch_id only — never sequence_ids from Slack

nodes.name: Update Original Slack Message
nodes.notes: On error path blocks keep review link + retryable error. Do not send email or mutate sequences here.

meta.notes: Env: SEO_AGENT_BASE_URL, MARKETING_AUTOMATION_SECRET, SLACK_BOT_TOKEN, SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET, SLACK_CLAY_LEADS_CHANNEL_ID, SLACK_CLAY_APPROVER_USER_IDS. Set NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=crypto. Only batch approve/reject — never email or sequence_ids.
